# Cadence AI Orchestration Platform

> Documentation for Cadence — multi-tenant AI Apps and agent platform: orchestration, plugins, security, and operations.

## Introduction

- [Welcome](https://cadence.ifelse.one/): Landing page and navigation into the docs

## Concepts

- [What is Cadence?](https://cadence.ifelse.one/concepts/what-is-cadence/): Product overview and positioning
- [How the platform works](https://cadence.ifelse.one/concepts/how-it-works/): Architecture and request flow
- [Security and access](https://cadence.ifelse.one/concepts/security-and-access/): AuthN, AuthZ, and tenancy boundaries

## Features

- [Feature guides](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/): Index of feature documentation
- [AI Apps](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/ai-apps/): Orchestrator instances and lifecycle
- [Central Points](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/central-points/): Routing and central endpoints
- [Chat and engine](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/chat-and-engine/): Engine headers and routing behavior
- [Hot-reload and AI App pool](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/hot-reload-ai-app-pool/): Pool behavior and reload semantics
- [JWT sessions and Redis](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/jwt-sessions/): Session storage and JWT flow
- [LLM configuration](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/llm-configuration/): BYOK and provider configuration
- [Multi-tenancy](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/multi-tenancy/): Orgs, context, and quotas
- [Observability](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/observability/): Health, logs, and OpenTelemetry
- [Orchestration backends](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/orchestration-backends/): Backend options and wiring
- [Orchestration modes](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/orchestration-modes/): Modes of orchestration
- [AI Agent SDK](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/plugin-sdk/): Python SDK for agents and plugins
- [AI Agent system](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/plugin-system/): Plugin model and lifecycle
- [AI Agents catalog](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/plugins-catalog/): Discovering and managing agents
- [Real-time streaming](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/real-time-streaming/): Streaming APIs and usage
- [Role-based access control](https://cadence.ifelse.one/features/role-based-access-control/): Permissions and roles

## Guides

- [API keys](https://cadence.ifelse.one/guides/api-keys/): Creating and using API keys
- [Configuration](https://cadence.ifelse.one/guides/configuration/): Environment and service configuration
- [Monitoring](https://cadence.ifelse.one/guides/monitoring/): Probes, metrics, and operations
- [OAuth2 clients](https://cadence.ifelse.one/guides/oauth2-clients/): Client registration and usage
- [Orchestrator load, plugins, and settings](https://cadence.ifelse.one/guides/orchestrator-load-and-plugin-settings/): Load behavior and settings
- [Platform admin](https://cadence.ifelse.one/guides/platform-admin/): Administrative tasks and APIs

## Integrations

- [OAuth2 and BFF patterns](https://cadence.ifelse.one/integrations/oauth-bff/): OAuth2 flows and backend-for-frontend patterns

## Reference

- [Error codes](https://cadence.ifelse.one/reference/error-codes/): API and platform error reference
- [Glossary](https://cadence.ifelse.one/reference/glossary/): Terms and definitions

## Optional

- [Developer onboarding](https://cadence.ifelse.one/guides/developer-onboarding/): Local setup and contribution workflow
- [Plugin upload and verification](https://cadence.ifelse.one/guides/plugin-upload-pipeline/): Upload pipeline and validation
- [Documentation audiences and outcomes](https://cadence.ifelse.one/reference/documentation-audiences/): Who each doc is for and expected outcomes
